name: scl-axl
description: AXL command-line interface — compile, validate, doctor, init
author: Silver Cloud Labs

scripts.bundle: esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --allow-overwrite --external:prompts --external:chokidar --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
